---
title: "Reproducible road safety research with R"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2020). Reproducible road safety research with R. *Royal Automotive Club Foundation*."
date: "2020-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_reproducible_2020"
citation-type: "report"
citation-type-label: "Report"
venue: "Royal Automotive Club Foundation"
doi: ""
publication-url: "https://www.racfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/Reproducible_road_safety_research_with_R_Lovelace_December_2020.pdf"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This work discusses the importance of reproducibility in road safety analysis and demonstrates how the R environment facilitates transparent research workflows. It provides examples of data processing and modeling within a reproducible framework."
---

**Type:** Report
**Venue:** Royal Automotive Club Foundation
**Year:** 2020

[URL](https://www.racfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/Reproducible_road_safety_research_with_R_Lovelace_December_2020.pdf) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This work discusses the importance of reproducibility in road safety analysis and demonstrates how the R environment facilitates transparent research workflows. It provides examples of data processing and modeling within a reproducible framework.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2020). Reproducible road safety research with R. *Royal Automotive Club Foundation*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@techreport{lovelace_reproducible_2020,
	type = {Tutorial},
	title = {Reproducible road safety research with {R}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {https://www.racfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/Reproducible_road_safety_research_with_R_Lovelace_December_2020.pdf},
	abstract = {This work discusses the importance of reproducibility in road safety analysis and demonstrates how the R environment facilitates transparent research workflows. It provides examples of data processing and modeling within a reproducible framework.},
	language = {en},
	institution = {Royal Automotive Club Foundation},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2020},
	note = {tex.ids: lovelace\_reproducible\_2020a},
	pages = {102},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
